description.value:
Specialised gauntlets that lock around the wrist to brace weapon recoil.

Effect: A Basic weapon can be fired one-handed without the normal -20 penalty, and pistol weapons that require two hands can be used one-handed without penalty. Required weapon training still applies.

Notes: -
